tasks.label: Append render_dungeon to UIPanels.gd
tasks.command:
Add-Content -Path "c:\Users\patri\Documents\falling-leaves\UIPanels.gd" -Value '
static func render_dungeon(gs, dc) -> String:
	var buffer = "[ %s - Floor %d ]\n" % [dc.dungeon_name.to_upper(), dc.current_floor]
	buffer += "WASD: Move/Attack | ,: Pick Up | .: Wait | ESC: Exit (Floor 1)\n"
	buffer += "--------------------------------------------------------------------------------\n"
	
	var view_w = 60
	var view_h = 25
	var start_x = dc.player_pos.x - view_w / 2
	var start_y = dc.player_pos.y - view_h / 2
	
	var map_lines = []
	for y in range(start_y, start_y + view_h):
		var line = ""
		for x in range(start_x, start_x + view_w):
			var p = Vector2i(x, y)
			if x < 0 or x >= dc.width or y < 0 or y >= dc.height:
				line += " "
				continue
			
			if not dc.fog_of_war[y][x]:
				line += " "
				continue
				
			if p == dc.player_pos:
				line += "[color=yellow]@[/color]"
				continue
				
			var enemy = dc.get_enemy_at(p)
			if enemy:
				line += "[color=red]%s[/color]" % enemy.symbol
				continue
				
			var item_found = false
			for it in dc.items:
				if it.pos == p:
					line += "[color=cyan]*[/color]"
					item_found = true
					break
			if item_found: continue
			
			var t = dc.grid[y][x]
			if t == "#": line += "[color=gray]#[/color]"
			elif t == ".": line += "[color=dim_gray].[/color]"
			elif t == "<": line += "[color=white]<[/color]"
			elif t == ">": line += "[color=white]>[/color]"
			else: line += t
		map_lines.append(line)
	
	# Side Info
	var info_col = []
	var cmd = gs.player.commander
	info_col.append("COMMANDER")
	info_col.append("HP: %d/%d" % [cmd.hp, cmd.hp_max])
	info_col.append("")
	info_col.append("BODY STATUS")
	for p_key in cmd.body:
		var part = cmd.body[p_key]
		info_col.append("%-8s: %d/%d" % [part.name.capitalize(), part.hp, part.hp_max])
	
	# Combine map and info
	for i in range(view_h):
		var map_line = map_lines[i]
		var info_line = info_col[i] if i < info_col.size() else ""
		buffer += "%-80s | %s\n" % [map_line, info_line]
		
	return buffer'

tasks.label: Rename Files PowerShell Task
